Description: Draft feature for centralizing the modifiable definition of best-photo semantics for model-assisted stages.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create the prompt template and structured output schema for best-photo judgments.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Model-assisted best-photo logic is defined through a modifiable prompt/schema layer.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add a versioning approach so prompt and schema changes are traceable across experiments.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Prompt/schema changes are trackable and isolated from core pipeline code.
